semverGroups.label: Internal @griffel/* deps must use a caret range when semver-pinned

versionGroups.label: Local @griffel/* cross-package deps must use the same caret range everywhere
Peer dependency ranges are intentionally permissive and managed per-package
devDependencies are not allowed in workspace packages; declare them on the monorepo root
All workspace package prod deps must be pinned at the monorepo root
